package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gorm_bootstrap_with_raw_sql_repositories_without_adapter_boundary: Codebases that bootstrap persistence with GORM but run repository queries through raw SQL without a clear adapter boundary.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule056NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule056NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule056NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario056Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule056NegativeService, input Rule056NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
